notes: Veo3 Fast generates 8s 720p clips at 9:16 with native audio. Prompts include 'no voiceover' direction so audio can be overlaid in post. Each prompt was extracted from copy/motion-prompts.md (motion-XX) or copy/kling-video-prompts.md (ugc-XX-section).

videos.name: 30-anos-travados
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical kinetic typography motion poster, deep navy (#0E1F4D) full-bleed background, no people. Sequential animated reveal in lowercase Brazilian Portuguese, bold geometric sans-serif (DM Sans / Poppins, white): first a small lowercase teal (#1FBFA8) label appears top-center reading 'rotação no internato:'; below it a massive bold number '4-8' scales up with a subtle bounce, followed by 'semanas.' in smaller white type; then the whole top block slides up and out; a new small lowercase teal label appears 'sua especialidade:'; a massive bold teal number '30' scales up with a dramatic bounce, then 'anos travados.' in white fades in, with 'travados' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal marker underline drawn in real-time; small static 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark appears bottom-center in white. Premium kinetic typography style, no other elements. Audio: subtle modern UI sound design — gentle digital clicks, soft whooshes timed to text reveals, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: tres-conselheiros
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical motion graphics ad on warm off-white background (#F5F7F9), no people. Three rounded chat-bubble cards animate in sequentially from different sides (top-left, right, bottom-left), each labeled with a small lowercase navy (#0E1F4D) tag for the speaker and a larger lowercase navy quote: bubble 1 'tio médico' — 'faz cardio. dá dinheiro.'; bubble 2 'professor' — 'você é boa em clínica.'; bubble 3 'mãe' — 'faz pediatria, é mais leve.' Each bubble bounces in over a beat. Then all three bubbles shake briefly. A thick teal (#1FBFA8) brushstroke crosses out all three diagonally. Final lowercase navy bold headline takes the full center: 'três conselheiros, três respostas.' with the four words 'três respostas diferentes' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal marker underline. Small 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark fades in bottom-center in navy. Editorial motion design, snappy timing. Audio: subtle soft pops as each bubble appears, a subtle 'swoosh' when the brushstroke crosses them out, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: 55-especialidades-grid
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical motion graphics ad, off-white background (#FAFAF8), no people. A small lowercase teal (#1FBFA8) label fades in at top-center reading 'as especialidades médicas reconhecidas no brasil:'; a grid of 55 small rounded rectangular cards builds rapidly in waves of 5-10 cards at a time, each card showing a lowercase navy (#0E1F4D) specialty name (e.g. 'anestesiologia', 'cardiologia', 'pediatria', 'radiologia', 'neurocirurgia', 'medicina de família'), arranged in a 5-column grid filling most of the canvas. The build feels accelerating and almost overwhelming; the whole grid pulses, then one specific card in the middle gets highlighted with a teal (#1FBFA8) glowing border and a 'TOP 1' lowercase label appears next to it; large bold lowercase navy headline overlays the bottom third: 'qual delas combina com o seu perfil?' with 'o seu perfil' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal marker underline; teal pill CTA button at the bottom reading 'fazer o match' in white lowercase. Premium editorial motion design. Audio: subtle digital ticks as each card appears, a soft 'ding' when the top match is highlighted, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: math-10-vs-55
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical kinetic typography motion graphics ad on warm off-white background (#F5F7F9), no people. Sequential reveal in lowercase Brazilian Portuguese, bold geometric sans-serif (DM Sans, dark navy #0E1F4D): small lowercase gray label at top reads 'quiz online médio:'; massive bold '10' scales in dramatically, then 'perguntas' fades next to it; the '10 perguntas' block slides up; small label 'vs' appears centered in teal (#1FBFA8); massive bold teal '55' scales in, then 'especialidades reconhecidas' in navy fades next to it; large bold lowercase navy headline reveals at the bottom: 'a matemática não fecha.' with 'não fecha' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal marker underline drawn in real-time; small 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark in navy appears bottom-center. Premium editorial kinetic typography. Audio: subtle digital tick on each number scale-up, a soft whoosh for the 'vs', no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: pricing-149-vs-30
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical kinetic typography motion graphics ad on deep navy (#0E1F4D) full-bleed background, no people. Sequential animated reveal in lowercase Brazilian Portuguese, bold geometric sans-serif: massive bold teal (#1FBFA8) 'R$ 149' scales up dramatically at the top of the canvas; a small lowercase white 'vs' appears just below it; massive bold white '30 anos' scales up below the 'vs'; lowercase white sub-headline appears below: 'de carreira.' with the word 'carreira' highlighted with a teal underline; larger lowercase white tagline reveals at the bottom: 'a matemática mais simples do dia.' with 'mais simples' highlighted teal; small 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark in white appears bottom-center. Editorial poster-style motion design, no other elements. Audio: subtle digital chime on each number reveal, a final soft accent on 'a matemática mais simples do dia', no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: phone-quiz-glitch
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical motion graphics ad showing an animated smartphone mockup centered on a clean off-white background (#F5F7F9), no people, just the phone shown as if held by an invisible hand with a slight handheld micro-sway. The phone screen shows a generic Brazilian Portuguese medical quiz UI in plain navy-and-white style. Rapid-cut: the screen shows 6 quiz questions flashing in sequence labeled 'pergunta 1 de 10', 'pergunta 2 de 10', up to 'pergunta 10 de 10', with multiple-choice options auto-selecting; transitions to a results page that reads in big lowercase: 'top 1: clínica geral'; the results page glitches and replaces it with 'anestesiologia', then 'ginecologia'; the phone screen fades to plain white; the canvas surrounding the phone fills with a bold lowercase navy headline (DM Sans, #0E1F4D) appearing in two lines: 'esse quiz não foi feito pra você.' with 'feito pra você' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal (#1FBFA8) marker underline; the phone is replaced by a teal pill CTA button reading 'ver o match completo' in white lowercase, with small 'med escolha' wordmark below in navy lowercase. Editorial motion design. Audio: subtle digital clicks as questions advance, a glitch sound effect on each results change, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: 3-verdades-incomodas
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical motion graphics ad on a soft warm gradient background from cream (#FAF6EE) at top to light teal-tinted white (#EDF7F4) at bottom, no people. A small lowercase teal (#1FBFA8) tag with rounded background appears top-center reading '3 verdades incômodas:'; three cards reveal one after the other, each with a small 'verdade 0X' teal tag and a bold lowercase navy (#0E1F4D) statement: verdade 01 'internato dura 4-8 semanas.'; verdade 02 'tio médico não tem dado seu perfil.'; verdade 03 'quiz de 10 perguntas não cobre 55.' with '55' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal marker underline; all three cards stack and dim slightly while a new bold lowercase navy headline overlays them: 'o que ninguém te disse sobre escolher sua especialidade.' with 'ninguém te disse' highlighted by a thick hand-drawn teal marker underline; teal pill CTA button reveals at the bottom reading 'ver as 3 verdades' in white lowercase; small 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark fades in below the CTA. Premium editorial motion design. Audio: subtle paper-flip sound on each card reveal, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: calendar-changing
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical motion graphics ad on warm off-white background (#F5F7F9), no people. A stylized weekly calendar view animates in centered on the canvas, showing 7 day cards (seg, ter, qua, qui, sex, sab, dom) in lowercase navy (#0E1F4D); each day reveals a different handwritten-style specialty name appearing in cursive teal (#1FBFA8) inside its day card, in quick succession — seg: 'cardio', ter: 'clínica', qua: 'pediatria', qui: 'anestesia', sex: 'GO', sab: '?', dom: '???'; the whole calendar shakes with frustration and dims; a bold lowercase navy headline (DM Sans) reveals over the calendar: 'você muda de top 1 toda semana.' with 'muda de top 1' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal marker underline; small 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark in navy fades in at the bottom-center. Editorial motion design, snappy timing. Audio: subtle pen scratch sounds as each handwritten word appears, a soft shake/rumble when the calendar shakes, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: ranking-narrativa
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical motion graphics ad showing an animated smartphone mockup on a soft cream background (#FAF6EE), no people, the phone shown floating with subtle handheld micro-sway. The phone displays the Med Escolha results screen. The screen fades from blank to a header in lowercase navy 'seu match · top 3 especialidades'; three result cards reveal one by one, each labeled with a specialty name in lowercase navy bold and a match percentage in teal (#1FBFA8): card 1 'anestesiologia · 84% match', card 2 'medicina física e reabilitação · 79% match', card 3 'pediatria · 71% match'; the first card expands and reveals a short narrative paragraph in smaller lowercase navy text below it; the canvas around the phone shows a lowercase teal headline at the top: 'ranking + narrativa' with a teal marker underline beneath; teal pill CTA button reveals below the phone reading 'definir minha especialidade' in white lowercase; small 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark in navy fades in below the CTA. Premium product-focused motion design. Audio: subtle UI tick on each card reveal, soft ambient digital tone, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: fim-do-achismo
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical kinetic typography motion graphics ad on deep navy (#0E1F4D) full-bleed background, no people. Sequential animated reveal in lowercase Brazilian Portuguese, bold geometric sans-serif (DM Sans / Poppins): a small lowercase teal (#1FBFA8) label fades in at the top reading 'fim do:'; a massive bold lowercase white 'achismo.' scales in dramatically with a thick teal marker stroke crossing it out in real-time; the 'achismo.' block slides up and out; a new bold lowercase white 'começo do:' appears at top; a massive bold lowercase teal 'método.' scales in, holding strong; a small teal pill CTA button reveals at the bottom reading 'definir minha especialidade' in white lowercase, with small 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark below in white. Editorial brand manifesto motion design, no other elements. Audio: a subtle whoosh on 'achismo' being struck through, a confident accent tone on 'método', no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: creative-01-interrupt-stat
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical kinetic typography motion poster, deep navy (#0E1F4D) full-bleed background. Sequential reveal of three large bold lowercase Brazilian Portuguese statements in geometric sans-serif (DM Sans style, white): first '6 anos de faculdade.' fades in and holds, then replaced by '4 a 8 semanas de rotação.', then '30 anos travados.' Final phrase '30 anos' highlighted with a saturated teal (#1FBFA8) marker underline drawn in real-time. Subtle quick fade-in and 5% scale-up animation per phrase. Small static 'med escolha' lowercase wordmark top-left in white. Kinetic typography style, premium editorial, no people, no other elements. Audio: subtle digital tick on each statement reveal, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: creative-01-engage-doctor-female
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical close-up portrait video. A smiling Brazilian female medical professional in her late 20s, shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a crisp white medical coat over a soft teal scrub top, stethoscope around her neck. She faces the camera directly with a warm confident smile, makes a small welcoming open-handed gesture mid-sentence. Bright modern clinic office background in soft bokeh. Soft natural daylight from a large window to her left, warm color grading. Slow micro-zoom-in (5% over the shot), subtle handheld feel. Shot on 85mm lens at f/2.0, shallow depth of field. Magazine-quality cinematography, calm authority mood. She does not speak loudly — she might whisper softly to herself in Portuguese under her breath, lips barely moving. Audio: a quiet clinic office ambience with very faint background sounds of distant footsteps, soft keyboard typing, and gentle air conditioning, with subtle ambient music underscore.

videos.name: creative-01-educate-split-screen
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical split-screen video composition with a thin vertical teal (#1FBFA8) divider line and a small lowercase teal label at the top reading 'achismo vs método'. LEFT HALF (cool desaturated grading): messy desk shot, hands flipping through a notebook covered with handwritten lists of medical specialty pros and cons, post-its with question marks scattered, a phone showing a generic online quiz with conflicting '?' results. Frustration energy, papers shuffled, slight motion blur. RIGHT HALF (warm grading, soft natural light): clean white-and-teal smartphone mockup screen showing the 'med escolha' app interface — a sleek ranked list of 5 medical specialties with percentage match scores in teal, the top item highlighted, accompanied by a small 'narrativa' preview text. The phone held steady by a calm hand. Slow lateral camera dolly. Audio: subtle paper-shuffling sounds on the left half, soft UI ticks on the right half, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: creative-01-offer-smartphone-cta
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical smartphone mockup video. A pair of hands holds a modern smartphone in portrait orientation against a clean off-white background. The phone screen displays the Med Escolha web interface: top lowercase navy (#0E1F4D) headline reads 'seu ranking + narrativa, R$ 149'; three feature rows below in lowercase navy with teal (#1FBFA8) check-mark icons reading '100+ pontos × 55 especialidades', 'ranking + narrativa', '14 dias de garantia'; at the bottom a prominent teal pill CTA button with white lowercase text 'definir minha especialidade' that gently pulses with a soft teal glow. Soft natural daylight from upper-left, warm color grading, subtle handheld micro-movement. Shot on 50mm lens, shallow depth of field. Premium product-focused mood. Audio: subtle ambient room tone, soft UI tone on the CTA pulse, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: creative-02-interrupt-pain-montage
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical fast-cut decision-fatigue sequence with quick cuts of ~1.5 seconds each. Shot 1: extreme close-up of a smartphone screen displaying a Brazilian Portuguese medical quiz result page showing three contradictory 'match #1' entries — 'clínica geral', 'anestesiologia', 'ginecologia' — stacked simultaneously to convey conflict. Shot 2: a male hand frustratedly crumpling a paper covered in handwritten medical specialty lists. Shot 3: index finger swiping right repeatedly on a phone, each swipe revealing another quiz interface in a blur. Final freeze frame: phone screen reads 'lista de prós e contras (vazia)' in lowercase navy on cream. Desaturated cool color grading throughout, subtle vignette. Mid-shot to extreme close-up framing. Audio: subtle paper crumple, finger swipes on glass, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: creative-02-engage-doctor-male
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical close-up portrait video. A smiling Brazilian male medical professional in his early 30s, short dark hair, light stubble, wearing a crisp white medical coat over a soft blue scrub top, stethoscope around his neck. He faces the camera directly with a warm confident smile, makes a small open-handed welcoming gesture, slight head nod. Bright modern hospital corridor background in soft bokeh. Soft natural daylight from a window behind him producing a gentle rim light on his hair and shoulders. Slow micro-zoom-in over the shot, subtle handheld feel. Shot on 85mm lens at f/2.0, shallow depth of field. Magazine-quality cinematography, warm color grading, calm authority mood. He does not speak — his lips are closed in a confident smile and he communicates through facial expression and the gesture. Audio: subtle natural ambient sound of a quiet hospital corridor, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: creative-02-educate-math-typography
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical kinetic typography sequence on a warm off-white background (#F5F7F9). Sequential animated reveal of a mathematical argument in lowercase Brazilian Portuguese, bold geometric sans-serif (DM Sans style, dark navy #0E1F4D): line 1 '10 a 30 perguntas' appears with quick fade-in; line 2 'cruzadas com 5 a 10 carreiras' fades in below; a teal (#1FBFA8) 'vs' appears centered between; line 3 '55 especialidades reconhecidas no brasil' reveals with '55 especialidades' highlighted by a hand-drawn teal marker underline drawn in real-time; final line in larger teal 'a matemática não fecha.' with subtle scale-up. Top-left shows small static 'med escolha' lowercase typed text in navy. Editorial kinetic typography style, no people. Audio: subtle digital tick on each line reveal, no voiceover, no music.

videos.name: creative-02-offer-checkout-cta
videos.prompt: 9:16 vertical smartphone mockup video. A masculine hand holds a modern smartphone in portrait orientation against a soft teal-tinted off-white background (#EDF7F4). The phone screen displays the Med Escolha checkout page: top lowercase navy headline reads 'o match completo, R$ 149'; four lowercase navy bullets below with teal (#1FBFA8) check-mark icons reading '100+ pontos × 55 áreas', 'ranking + narrativa', 'acervo 50+ lives', '14 dias de garantia'; bottom: a prominent teal pill CTA button with white lowercase text 'definir minha especialidade' gently pulsing with a soft glow. Subtle handheld micro-movement, slow lateral parallax. Soft natural light, warm color grading. Shot on 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, premium product-focused mood.
